modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Reporting a crime near the USD campus

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to report a crime that happened around the USD campus, but I’m not sure how to do it right. I filled out the form, but I’m worried I missed something important. It’s really confusing, and I just want to make sure the right people know what happened.
